name: Morses Club PLC
summary: Morses Club PLC, together with its subsidiaries, provides home collected credit and online financial services in the United Kingdom. It offers a range of credit and digital e-money current account products. The company provides consumer credit through a network of approximately 1,385 self-employed agents, as well as online channels. Morses Club PLC was incorporated in 2009 and is based in Nottingham, the United Kingdom.
